nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stripe-breasted seedeater
nodes.summary: Stripe-breasted seedeater（Crithagra striatipectus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Stripe-breasted seedeater。

nodes.name: 苏丹
nodes.summary: 苏丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联94种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Sand partridge、Scaly spurfowl等94种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Stripe-breasted seedeater
nodes.summary: The stripe-breasted seedeater (Crithagra striatipectus) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is native to Sudan, Ethiopia, and Kenya. The stripe-breasted seedeater was formerly conspecific with Reichard's seedeater (Crithagra reichardi), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. References
